full_text:
Cell count 1):

total: 1.82 E6

live: 1.02 E6

viability: 56.1 %

size: 7.1 um

Cell count 2):

total: 2.18 E6

live: 1.28 E6

viability: 58.7 %

size: 6.2 um

Total cell count: 2.00 e6 / ml (total of 3 mL)

A) RNA/DNA extraction (30 drops) + FFPE sample (4 drops) + Flow organoid (12 drops):

48-well plate

DNA/RNA + FFPE + flow: 46 wells x 40 µl x = 1840 µl → round up to 1900 uL

1500 cells/µl = 2.85E6

→ make 2 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 950 µl each

volume to take from cell suspension: 712 uL

ORG full medium → 79.2 uL

ome-gel → 134 µl

aprotinin → 2.9 µl

thrombin → 2.9 µl

fibrinogen → 19 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 350 uL medium

B) Drug treatment for IF:

384-well plate

Leave outer wells empty = in total plate 308 wells 308 wells x 20 µl = 6160 µl

1000 cells/µl = 6.16E6 cells

→ make 2x of 3500 uL on a reservoir

volume to take from cell suspension: uL

ORG full medium → uL

ome-gel → 493.5 µl

aprotinin → 10.5 µl

thrombin → 10.5 µl

fibrinogen → 70 µl

→ Let it solidify for 40-60 min - add 25 uL medium

→ Next day add drugs using Tecan drug dispenser

D) Sample for Flow - Day 0

→ Collect 1.0E6 cells per 900 uL flow staining buffer (500 uL)

-> 0.5 E6 per sample (stained and unstained)

E) Sample for cryo

→ Collect 2.0 e6 cells per 1 mL stemcell banker (x2)

plate (1): For DNA & RNA

Drops plated on non-cell culture treated 24 well plates (Greiner) to test whether we could avoid cells dropping on the bottom.

plate (2): For Flow & FFPE

Tumor piece which was selected for dissociation was about 2cm x 2 cm. Dissociation was done on 20 mL and for 75 min. However, cell yield was extremely poor! Suspension contained a large amount of adipocytes.

Due to the low cell count, no drug treatment was done.

Omegel was solidifying were quickly so that last wells of each plate have about ⅔ of the whole volume.

Each well / omegel culture had good amount of single cells but also multicellular clusters on day 0.

Next day:

Cultures

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02
